violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Refrigerator closest to hand sink not maintained below 41 degrees F.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Minor detail cleaning needed.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical ware washing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Receptacles, covers/lids, adequate number, clean, insect/rodent proof, storage, frequency, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
